message:
feat(abi): continue host symbol resolution integration and refresh conformance artifacts

Extend host_resolve integration across ABI modules with incremental
improvements to dlfcn, malloc, pthread, and stdio layers. Includes
malloc_abi test updates.

Conformance:
- Refresh all conformance JSON reports (closure sweep, coverage
  snapshot, cross-report consistency, fixture pipeline, fuzz
  targets, per-symbol tests, perf regression, stub census)
- Update CVE arena results across all test scenarios with current
  trace data and artifact indices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
